name: BlockAgent
description: Private DeFi Advisory Agent — agentic portfolio analysis via Venice AI (zero data retention) with Python-based statistical analysis, live CoinGecko market data, and optional delegated execution via ScopedDelegation smart contract (ERC-7715 inspired).
supportedTools: Venice AI (private inference, zero data retention)
CoinGecko (live market prices and historical data)
decisionLoop: analyze (agentic loop: fetch history → Python stats → structured report)
validate (deterministic safety checks on LLM output)

executionModes.analysis-only: Default. No private key needed. Reads public onchain data and produces advisory recommendations.
executionModes.delegated: Optional. Requires ScopedDelegation contract deployed by user. Agent uses a session key with on-chain spending limits (max per tx, daily cap, token whitelist, expiry). User can revoke instantly.

safetyGuardrails: Analysis-only by default — no keys, no execution, no risk
All inference routed through Venice AI — zero data retention
Deterministic validation layer: riskScore [1-10], percentage [0-100], max 10% per trade
Delegated execution enforced on-chain: per-tx cap, daily limit, token whitelist, expiry, instant revocation
Agent session key has zero value — all authority lives in the ScopedDelegation contract
Python sandbox: import hook + stripped env + regex fast-reject (3-layer defense)
Uniswap V3 integration: API key for token discovery, local calldata from on-chain pool state for privacy-first execution
MEV protection via PRIVATE_RPC_URL (Flashbots Protect / MEV Blocker)
All actions logged to agent_log.json for auditability

privacyArchitecture.inference: Venice AI — zero data retention, no prompt logging
privacyArchitecture.dataFlow: Onchain data (public) → Venice analysis (private, ephemeral) → User receives result
limitations: CoinGecko price history fetches reveal which tokens are queried (not which wallet)
Swap calldata built locally from on-chain pool state — no centralized API quote leak
On-chain execution MEV-shielded via PRIVATE_RPC_URL when configured
Inference is private but the portfolio data read from chain is public
